seoTitle: Parrawe vs Patersonia — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Parrawe and Patersonia. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Parrawe and Patersonia.
heading: Parrawe vs Patersonia — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Parrawe, Tasmania and Patersonia, Tasmania. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Patersonia has a lower overall climate risk score (27/100) compared to Parrawe (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Parrawe or Patersonia safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Parrawe has a flood risk score of 23/100, while Patersonia scores 27/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Parrawe scores 57/100 for bushfire risk. Patersonia scores 18/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Parrawe or Patersonia?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Patersonia has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
